WHAT'S NEW IN PULSAR 125

Performance

Unmatched Power

Design

Sporty & Vibrant

Technology

Class leading features

Safety

Best in segment safety

View Pulsar 125 Specifications

Performance

Unmatched Power

Never fall short on the road with 8.68 kW (11.8 PS) power and 10.8 Nm torque.

Design

Sporty & Vibrant

Flaunt your style with all new graphics. Pulsar 125 is available in both single and split seat options.

Technology

Class leading features

Equipped with connected Digital console, 5-step adjustable nitrox rear suspension and all LED setup.

Safety

Best in segment safety

240 mm ventilated front disc with anti-skid tech. 1320 mm wheelbase and tubeless tyres ensure stability.

Bajaj Pulsar 125 Specifications

Max Power

8.68 kW (11.8 PS) @ 8500 rpm

Rear Suspension

Twin Hydraulic Suspension

Displacement

124.38 cc

Fuel Tank

15 L

Engine Type

4-Stroke, 2-Valve, Twin Spark BSVI Compliant Engine

Pulsar 125 FAQs

What are the colours options available for Pulsar 125?

Black Race Red, Black Cyan Blue, Black Dark Grey & Racing Red Tan Beige

What is the max power of Pulsar 125?

8.68 kW (11.8 PS) @ 8500 rpm

What is fuel tank capacity of Pulsar 125?

15 L

What is the Ex-showroom price of Pulsar 125?

Ex-showroom Price for Pulsar 125 Carbon Fibre single seat is ₹ 85 633/-*
Ex-showroom Price for Pulsar 125 Carbon Fibre split seat is ₹ 87 527/-*
Ex-showroom Price for Pulsar 125 Neon Single Seat is ₹ 79 048/-*

What is the engine capacity of Pulsar 125 and power figures?

Pulsar 125 is powered by 124.38 cc engine generating 8.68 kW (11.8 PS) Power @8500 rpm

What is the torque figure of Pulsar 125?

Pulsar 125 generates 10.8 Nm Torque @6500 rpm

Who is the Pulsar 125 for?

The Pulsar 125 is the perfect bike for a rider looking for the iconic sports bike design, with great street presence, sporty pick-up and excellent comfort. The Pulsar 125 is the perfect antidote to the boring 125cc motorcycles in the market.

Does Pulsar 125 have Bluetooth feature?

Yes, Pulsar 125 has been equipped with Bluetooth connectivity and Digital console.
